query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_customers,
  SUM(CASE WHEN smsCampaignSent = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as campaign_sent,
  SUM(CASE WHEN smsCampaignSent = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as campaign_not_sent,
  MIN(smsCampaignDate) as first_send_date,
  MAX(smsCampaignDate) as last_send_date
FROM customers;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PAf3reHgcPDAtuw.root --database FqYRztyCVa3fHbrFjU6jAV --execute 
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_customers,
  SUM(CASE WHEN smsCampaignSent = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as campaign_sent,
  SUM(CASE WHEN smsCampaignSent = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as campaign_not_sent,
  MIN(smsCampaignDate) as first_send_date,
  MAX(smsCampaignDate) as last_send_date
FROM customers;
